title: Paul Verhelst
text: Home * People * Paul Verhelst Paul Verhelst , a Dutch computer chess expert, who published and maintained interesting chess [1] and chess programming sites [2] . Ed Schröder once mentioned the 0x88 square difference lookup as Paul Verhelst way [3] , which was used and described by Paul Wiereyn [4] and, according to David Kittinger , was originally attributed to Mikhail Botvinnik [5] .
